label: The Four Caliphs
description: The Rightly Guided Caliphs who led the Muslim community after Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).

label: Ten Promised Paradise
description: The ten companions specifically promised paradise by Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).

label: Battles & Expeditions
description: Major military engagements and expeditions of early Islam.

label: Early Converts
description: The first people to embrace Islam and face persecution for their faith.

label: Migration (Hijrah)
description: The journey from Makkah to Madinah that transformed the Muslim community.

label: Bravery & Courage
description: Companions renowned for their extraordinary courage in the face of danger.

label: Generosity
description: Companions known for their remarkable charitable giving and sacrifice.

label: Scholars & Narrators
description: Companions who preserved and transmitted the knowledge of Islam to future generations.

label: Justice & Leadership
description: Companions known for their fair governance, wise counsel, and principled leadership.

label: Women Companions
description: The remarkable women of early Islam who shaped the community through their faith and contributions.
